headline: Brown & Brown, Inc. named to Great Place To Work 2026 Best Workplaces in Canada and 2026 Best Workplaces with Most Trusted Executive Team Lists
summary: DAYTONA BEACH, Fla., April 01, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- J. Powell Brown, president and chief executive officer, and Julie Turpin, chief people officer, are pleased to announce that Brown & Brown, Inc. has been named to the 2026 Best Workplaces™ in Canada and Best Workplace™ with Most Trusted Executive Teams Lists. Chief People Officer Julie Turpin stated, “We are so proud to be named among the Best Workplaces in Canada. This recognition is a direct reflection of The Power of WE and our dedicatio
